full_title: Federated States of Micronesia - Level 1: Exercise Normal Precautions
content_md:
Exercise normal precaution

in the **Federated States of Micronesia (FSM)**.

The Federated States of Micronesia (FSM) is generally a safe destination for travelers.  

  * Review our [Travel Guidance](/en/international-travel/travel-advisories/federated-states-of-micronesia.html#requirements "Travel Guidance") for the FSM to learn how to prepare for a safe trip.
